comment: News posts manifest. Newest first. See docs/NEWS.md for how to add a post.

posts.title: Veteran Tax Relief Gains Bipartisan Support
posts.description: HB2089 and companion bills authorizing the Missouri Disabled Veterans Homestead Exemption are gaining bipartisan momentum in Jefferson City.

posts.title: How the Exemption Works
posts.description: A plain-language breakdown of how HB2089 would provide tiered property tax relief based on VA disability rating.

posts.title: Welcome to MoVets.org
posts.description: A non-partisan, grassroots effort to help Missouri's disabled veterans get fair property tax relief through HB2089.
